product.name: Horlicks Malted Ready to Drink Packet
Horlicks Chocolate Malty Ready to Drink

product.description: A household must-have, most of us grew up with this drink. Its chocolate-malty taste is loved by everyone irrespective of their age. MILO is the familiarity we seek around the world. From a cup of Iced MILO on a hot day when you are hanging out with friends at the coffee shop to a warm cup of comfort when you are staying at home on a rainy day or a MILO packet drink when you are in a rush and in need of a quick snack - MILO has it all covered!

metaData.Ingredients:
Skimmed Milk Powder (4.6%) (Cow's Milk), Extract of Malt Barley and Starch (4.2%), Sugar, Cocoa Powder (1.2%), Palm Olein, Minerals (Calcium Carbonate, Dicalcium Phosphate, Ferric Pyrophosphate), Instant Coffee (0.1%), Flavouring (Contains Wheat), Acidity Regulators (INS504i, INS340ii, INS332ii, INS339ii), Stabiliser (INS418), Vitamins (B2, B3, B6, B12, D), Emulsifier (INS322, Soya Lecithin)
Contains: Wheat and Barley (Gluten), Soya and Milk. May contain: Tree Nuts.
metaData.Key Information:
• Elevate your day with the new MILO Boost Up, now enhanced with the stimulating dash of real coffee.
• This unique fusion combines the beloved taste and nutrition of MILO with the invigorating kick of coffee, offering you the perfect beverage to fuel both your mind and body.?
• BCAAs + B Vitamins
• Antioxidants + Electrolytes
• Caffeine-Free
